open_blockers.blocker: Operating legal entity, address, jurisdiction, final contacts and governing terms are unset.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Counsel supplies and approves all final identity and contract fields for the exact candidate.

open_blockers.blocker: Canary terms, privacy notice, AUP, supplier terms/DPA and acceptance design are drafts.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Counsel approves versioned documents and a tested immutable acceptance/reacceptance receipt.

open_blockers.blocker: Lawful bases, roles, subprocessors, transfers, retention and rights rules are not approved.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Complete the field-level matrix and obtain privacy counsel approval.

open_blockers.blocker: Account export, erasure, object lifecycle and backup tombstone workflows are not implemented or rehearsed.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Pass synthetic cross-store export/deletion and backup-restore tombstone tests.

open_blockers.blocker: An independently controlled supplier host can receive and retain buyer input; verified location and contractual duties are absent.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Keep canary operator-controlled and synthetic-only; before expansion, approve processor contracts, location evidence and destination-pinned egress/attestation risk.

open_blockers.blocker: Abuse contact, mandatory-reporting duties, enforcement controls and appeals are not approved or rehearsed.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Staff contacts, approve policy, prove kill switches and complete the named-participant tabletop.

open_blockers.blocker: Project license and complete third-party/model/font notices are absent or incomplete.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Owner approves project license; counsel approves artifact-bound third-party register and release notice bundle.

open_blockers.blocker: Visual assets lack creator assignment, source/reference receipts and trademark review.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Resolve every blocked asset provenance entry for the exact distributed hashes.

open_blockers.blocker: Buyer tax, supplier classification, reporting, currency and jurisdiction analysis is absent.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Approve jurisdictions and obligations before any real charge or payout.

open_blockers.blocker: Stripe test-mode cash/dispute/payout matrix and approved commercial disclosures are incomplete.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Pass the full test-mode matrix and counsel review; live money remains separately gated.

open_blockers.blocker: These artifacts are not bound to a final clean candidate commit and hashes are unset.
open_blockers.exit_criterion: Populate final commit and document hashes, run validation, and obtain named approvals without changing reviewed content.
